title: organization — trait composition
description: Two owned traits. `BelongsToOrganization` for downstream models (Branch, Team, planned Facility + Season) with an `organization_id` FK. `HasOrganizationHierarchy` for the Organization model itself — adds descendant/ancestor accessor methods over the materialised tree_path.

owned.description: Mixed into models with an `organization_id` FK. Adds (a) belongsTo relation `organization()`, (b) global scope filtering to the request's active Organization when composed with a matching middleware, (c) auto-fill of organization_id on save from RequestContext::organization() when not explicitly set, (d) refuses cross-organization writes on save (defense-in-depth beyond the FK).
owned.compose_order: AFTER BelongsToTenant. BelongsToTenant sets tenant_id first; BelongsToOrganization then enforces that the resolved Organization's tenant_id matches.
usedBy: facility::Facility (planned — cascades through Branch, but a direct FK exists on the row for query-plan efficiency)

owned.description: Applied to the Organization model itself. Adds five accessor methods for tree navigation, backed by the materialised tree_path (never a recursive CTE): `parent()`, `children()`, `ancestors()`, `descendants()`, `siblings()`, plus two predicate helpers `isAncestorOf($other)` and `isDescendantOf($other)`.

method_semantics.parent(): belongsTo(Organization) via parent_id — returns null on root nodes
method_semantics.children(): hasMany(Organization) via parent_id — direct children only
method_semantics.ancestors(): computed from tree_path split — returns root→parent (self excluded), ordered
method_semantics.descendants(): WHERE tree_path LIKE '.<self.id>.%' AND id != self.id — returns every descendant, ordered by tree_path
method_semantics.siblings(): WHERE parent_id = self.parent_id AND id != self.id

tenancy.compose_order_note: MUST come first among the tenant-scoping traits. Applies the global scope + fills tenant_id on save.

notes: BelongsToTenant → HasOrganizationHierarchy → HasSlug order matters: tenant scope must apply BEFORE slug uniqueness check (partial unique per tenant).
SoftDeletes for the archive semantics — status=archived + deleted_at set on the same operation.
Auditable via `owen-it/laravel-auditing` — compliance-critical fields (parent_id, is_default, status, tree_path, branding fields) are captured on every mutation.

HasActivityLog for the tenant-visible activity feed. Distinct from Auditable — Activity is the human-readable feed (`Kate reparented Elite Sports under Community Group`); Audit is the field-level diff for compliance.
